g.text: Title: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — Reviewed Standard Schematic

g.desc: Title: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — Reviewed Standard Schematic

g.text: U1 is SN74AHCT125N shown as U1A/U1B/U1C/U1D/U1P; net names match audited JSON netlist

g.desc: U1 is SN74AHCT125N shown as U1A/U1B/U1C/U1D/U1P; net names match audited JSON netlist

g.text: RP1 high-current reverse-polarity protection replaces rejected 1N5822 full-current path

g.desc: RP1 high-current reverse-polarity protection replaces rejected 1N5822 full-current path

g.text: RP1 = verified high-current reverse-polarity block; no 1N5822 in the full-current path.

g.desc: RP1 = verified high-current reverse-polarity block; no 1N5822 in the full-current path.

g.text: U1 = SN74AHCT125N DIP-14 quad AHCT tri-state buffer

g.desc: U1 = SN74AHCT125N DIP-14 quad AHCT tri-state buffer

g.text: Units: U1A/U1B used, U1C/U1D disabled, U1P power pins 14/7

g.desc: Units: U1A/U1B used, U1C/U1D disabled, U1P power pins 14/7

g.text: F1 is off-board inline before J3.

g.desc: F1 is off-board inline before J3.

g.text: Common GND only; never feed ESP32 VIN from 12 V.

g.desc: Common GND only; never feed ESP32 VIN from 12 V.

g.text: A pin 12 tied low; Y pin 11 NC

g.desc: A pin 12 tied low; Y pin 11 NC

g.text: A pin 9 tied low; Y pin 8 NC

g.desc: A pin 9 tied low; Y pin 8 NC

g.text: 12 V POWER INPUT / PROTECTION — HIGH CURRENT OFF-BREADBOARD

g.desc: 12 V POWER INPUT / PROTECTION — HIGH CURRENT OFF-BREADBOARD

g.text: Verified netlist names match docs/esp32-breadboard/netlist.json. 12 V LED rail and USB 5 V logic rail are isolated except GND_COMMON.

g.desc: Verified netlist names match docs/esp32-breadboard/netlist.json. 12 V LED rail and USB 5 V logic rail are isolated except GND_COMMON.
